title: MD-015 Implement Windows 365 Cloud PCs
summary: This learning path provides instruction on the implementation of Windows 365, including application management, and provisioning, deploying, and managing Windows 365 Cloud PCs.

sections.title: MD-015 Implement Windows 365 Cloud PCs
sections.summary: This learning path provides instruction on the implementation of Windows 365, including application management, and provisioning, deploying, and managing Windows 365 Cloud PCs.

lessons.title: Examine Windows 365
lessons.content_md:
This module introduces the different Windows 365 editions that are available and examines foundational Windows 365 concepts including architecture, lifecycle, and customer data handling.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/examine-windows-365/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Provision and deploy Windows 365 Cloud PCs
lessons.content_md:
This module covers the deployment, provisioning, and imaging options available for each edition of Windows 365. It also covers the Windows 365 Boot feature that enables users to sign-in directly to their Cloud PC.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/provision-windows-365-cloud-pcs/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Provision and deploy Windows 365 Cloud PCs

lessons.title: Explore Windows 365 Cloud PC management options
lessons.content_md:
Management options for Windows 365 range from web portal to Microsoft Intune. The topics covered in this module include: Cloud PC management options. Windows 365 security. Role-based access control. Windows 365 reports.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-windows-365-cloud-pc-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Explore Windows 365 Cloud PC management options

lessons.title: Manage Apps in Windows 365 Cloud PCs
lessons.content_md:
After provisioning your Windows 365 Cloud PCs, you can either install apps manually or by using Microsoft Intune. This module covers application installation, nested virtualization, and Microsoft Teams installation and optimization.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-apps-windows-365-cloud-pcs/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Apps in Windows 365 Cloud PCs

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica MD-015 Implement Windows 365 Cloud PCs
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **MD-015 Implement Windows 365 Cloud PCs**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
